audit_items.proof_trace: The contained raw pointer `px` is never dereferenced within `weak_ptr.hpp`. All operations on `px` are assignments, copies, or swaps only; the only `*` operator in the file applies to `this` (the weak_ptr object itself, never null in method calls). The design mandates callers use `lock()` to obtain a `shared_ptr<T>` before any dereference, and `shared_ptr.hpp` contains the actual dereference operators with `assert(px != 0)` guards.
